allow: Bash(npx wrangler pages project create tw-rich-politician-2025 --production-branch main)
Bash(npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name tw-rich-politician-2025)
Bash(npx wrangler pages project create tw-rich-politician --production-branch main)
Bash(npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name tw-rich-politician)

Bash(node -e "import\(''@opendataloader/pdf''\).then\(m => { console.log\(''convert:'', typeof m.convert\); console.log\(''run:'', typeof m.run\); console.log\(''buildArgs:'', typeof m.buildArgs\); }\)")

Bash(node --input-type=module -e 'import fs from ""fs""; const dir = ""data/consolidated""; const missing = {}; const files = fs.readdirSync\(dir\).filter\(f => f.endsWith\("".json""\)\); for \(const f of files\) { const d = JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\(dir+""/""+f, ""utf8""\)\); for \(const s of d.stocks\) { if \(s.ticker === null\) { missing[s.cleanName] = \(missing[s.cleanName]||0\) + 1; } } } const sorted = Object.entries\(missing\).sort\(\(a,b\)=>b[1]-a[1]\); console.log\(""Missing tickers \("" + sorted.length + ""\):""\); sorted.forEach\(\([k,v]\)=>console.log\(v+""x"", k\)\);')

Bash(node --input-type=module -e 'import fs from ""fs""; const dir = ""data/consolidated""; let total=0, matched=0; const files = fs.readdirSync\(dir\).filter\(f => f.endsWith\("".json""\)\); for \(const f of files\) { const d = JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\(dir+""/""+f, ""utf8""\)\); for \(const s of d.stocks\) { total++; if \(s.ticker !== null\) matched++; } } console.log\(""Total stocks:"", total, ""Matched:"", matched, ""Missing:"", total-matched, ""Rate:"", \(matched/total*100\).toFixed\(1\)+""%""\);')

Bash(node -e 'const m=JSON.parse\(require\(""fs""\).readFileSync\(""data/stock-ticker-map.json""\)\); const search=[""台新"",""國巨"",""新光金""]; for\(const s of search\){const found=Object.keys\(m\).filter\(k=>k.includes\(s\)\).slice\(0,5\); console.log\(s,""->"",found\)}')
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(d[''stat'']\); print\(d[''data''][0] if d.get\(''data''\) else ''no data''\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); t=d[''tables''][0]; print\(''Fields:'', t[''fields'']\); print\(''Data count:'', t[''totalCount'']\); print\(''First:'', t[''data''][0] if t[''data''] else ''empty''\)")

Bash(node --input-type=module -e 'import fs from ""fs""; const d = JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\(""data/consolidated/042-王鴻薇.json"", ""utf8""\)\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(d.deposits, null, 2\)\); console.log\(""total:"", d.depositsTotal\);')
Bash(node --input-type=module -e 'import fs from ""fs""; const m = JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\(""data/party-mapping.json"",""utf8""\)\); console.log\(""李貞秀:"", m[""李貞秀""]\);')
